title: Mending Recharged
description: Mending Recharged lets Mending consume stored XP from your XP bar to smoothly repair all damaged Mending items - no XP orbs required.
body:
# Mending Recharged

Mending can also consume stored XP from your XP bar to repair items automatically and smoothly — even without picking up XP orbs.

Mending Recharged enhances the Mending enchantment without replacing vanilla behavior.
Whenever you have damaged items with Mending, the mod can additionally use your stored XP from the XP bar to continue repairing — even when you're not collecting XP orbs.

Repairing is smooth and adaptive: it only consumes the XP that is actually needed to repair your damaged Mending items (until everything is fully repaired or you run out of XP).

## Features
- Vanilla Mending still works as usual
- Additional repairing using stored XP from the XP bar
- Repairs all damaged Mending items (inventory, armor, offhand)
- Smooth & adaptive: no fixed drain, only what's required
- Works in singleplayer & multiplayer (server-side logic)

## Compatibility
- Minecraft: 1.20.1
- Forge: 1.20.1
